## Description

Clearly describe the change and why it's needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds with `./gradlew assembleFreeDebug`
- [ ] Code follows existing style conventions
- [ ] No hardcoded strings (use string resources)
- [ ] PR targets `main` branch

## Related Issue

Closes # (issue number)
